arts.ttl: Cole Palmer misses first Chelsea penalty to end Premier League record streak
arts.sum: Cole Palmer’s perfect penalty record – 12 Premier League spot-kicks taken, 12 scored – backed up his “cold” image as a man who delivers under pressure, but that run finally came to an end at Stamford Bridge on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea sent scouts to watch “phenomenal” 19-G/A star last month
arts.sum: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea are reportedly keeping tabs on the Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram and they could look to make a move for him in the summer. According to TBR football, all three clubs sent scouts to watch the player in action last month in the Champions League. The 27-year-old friend International has done […] The post Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea sent scouts to watch “phenomenal” 19-G/A star last month appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Chelsea host Leicester in the Premier League
arts.sum: Fifth-place Chelsea host Leicester, who languish in the Premier League relegation zone - follow live.

arts.ttl: Trevoh Chalobah shows true colours with message to forgotten Chelsea star
arts.sum: Ipswich pushed to grab a late leveller but Palace held on to claim a narrow win and record back-to-back home victories in the Premier League for the first time this season. Trevoh Chalobah has sent a message to Chelsea loanee Ben Chilwell after he played for Crystal Palace on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea drop double team news hint for Leicester City as Enzo Maresca dilemma solved
arts.sum: But Maresca's men must turn their attention to Leicester first as they aim for a top four finish and a place in next season's Champions League. However, there have been suggestions that Maresca may choose to leave Caicedo out, with the midfielder a yellow card away from a two-game ban and rivals Arsenal up next in the league.

arts.ttl: Reece James fires message to Enzo Maresca as Chelsea position debated amid Thomas Tuchel chat
arts.sum: James, though, is unsure of the position he will end up playing the most in his career but he is prepared to continue in this new-look role and look to educate himself more about how he can improve there. Some of James' best football with the Blues have been overlapping down the right-hand side but Maresca believes his captain has all of the attributes to become a world-class central midfielder.

arts.ttl: Why Reece James is not in Chelsea squad vs Leicester City explained as big decision made
arts.sum: The right-back started against Southampton on the substitutes' bench last time out in the Premier League after a run of six-straight appearances in the top flight having battled hamstring injuries this season and was included from the off against Copenhagen in the UEFA Conference League on Thursday. There is a boost for the Blues, though, with midfielder Romeo Lavia back in the squad after a hamstring injury of his own.

arts.ttl: What Enzo Maresca did to shock Chelsea as Mauricio Pochettino point and manager statement made
arts.sum: The game starts with Pochettino's Chelsea cutting through Maresca's Leicester like the midfield was not there. This isn't the upcoming Premier League fixture, on March 9, but is from 12 months ago in the FA Cup. 51 weeks prior, to be exact, when Mauricio Pochettino was the head coach of Chelsea.

arts.ttl: 10-G/A this season: Man United to battle Chelsea, Arsenal for £42m-rated wide player
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing the Inter Milan defender Denzel Dumfries at the end of the season. The Inter Milan defender has established himself as one of the finest in the Italian league and he has eight goals and two assists to his name this season. Sancho joined Chelsea from Man Utd in an 11th-hour Deadline Day loan deal last summer. Man Utd are now laughing all the way to the bank having managed to guarantee a sale for as much as €30 million this summer.
